# Meok Eu Ai Act Art 13 Ifu MCP

> EU AI Act Article 13 Instructions for Use generator - provider-side IFU + FRIA crosswalk

`meok-eu-ai-act-art-13-ifu-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install meok-eu-ai-act-art-13-ifu-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx meok-eu-ai-act-art-13-ifu-mcp
```

## Tools

- `generate_ifu`
- `check_ifu_completeness`
- `list_art_13_3_elements` — Return the 7 mandatory Article 13(3) IFU content elements.
- `list_art_14_oversight_measures` — Return the catalogue of Article 14 human-oversight measure types.
- `crosswalk_to_fria`
- `generate_human_oversight_section`
- `sign_ifu_chain` — HMAC-sign the IFU + emit a publishable audit attestation.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/meok-eu-ai-act-art-13-ifu-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-eu-ai-act-art-13-ifu-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
